---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a game, art, UI, or tooling improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What feels weak, missing, ugly, confusing, or unfinished?

## Proposal

What is the smallest strong change that would improve it?

## Why It Fits Killer Queen

Explain how this helps feel, readability, identity, or replay value.

## Scope

What should stay out of this change?

## Extra Context

Mockups, references, clips, or links.
